query:
-- Update suppliers with realistic Chinese furniture factory names
UPDATE suppliers 
SET 
  name = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN '佛山市顺德区美家家具有限公司'
    WHEN 2 THEN '东莞市凯旋家具制造厂'
    WHEN 3 THEN '广州市番禺区雅居家具厂'
    WHEN 4 THEN '深圳市宝安区鸿运家具有限公司'
    WHEN 5 THEN '中山市港口镇华美家具厂'
    ELSE name
  END,
  contact_person = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN '张建国'
    WHEN 2 THEN '李明华'
    WHEN 3 THEN '王志强'
    WHEN 4 THEN '陈国强'
    WHEN 5 THEN '刘德华'
    ELSE contact_person
  END,
  phone = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN '+86 757 2688 8888'
    WHEN 2 THEN '+86 769 8866 6666'
    WHEN 3 THEN '+86 20 3456 7890'
    WHEN 4 THEN '+86 755 2789 9999'
    WHEN 5 THEN '+86 760 8877 5566'
    ELSE phone
  END,
  email = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN 'sales@meijia-furniture.com'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'export@kaixuan-furniture.com'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'info@yaju-furniture.cn'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'business@hongyun-furniture.com'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'contact@huamei-furniture.cn'
    ELSE email
  END,
  address = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN '广东省佛山市顺德区龙江镇家具产业园A区'
    WHEN 2 THEN '广东省东莞市厚街镇家具大道168号'
    WHEN 3 THEN '广东省广州市番禺区石基镇工业路88号'
    WHEN 4 THEN '广东省深圳市宝安区西乡街道家具城B栋'
    WHEN 5 THEN '广东省中山市港口镇木河迳工业区'
    ELSE address
  END
WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5);
